# Workflows

Use this file for repeatable procedures. Use `AGENTS.md` for routing and
always-loaded rules.

## Start Work

1. Read `AGENTS.md`.
2. Use its routing table to load the smallest useful docs.
3. Check repository status before editing.
4. Preserve unrelated edits.

## Close Work

1. Run relevant validation.
2. Update docs whose authority changed.
3. Record durable decisions in `docs/decisions.md`.
4. Move exploratory notes into `docs/ideas.md` or leave them in
   `docs/workbench/` with clear status.
